'''nahuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:svara|svara]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:svara|svara]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nahuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næhijith|næhijith]] || [[word:næhijij|næhijij]] || [[word:næhijish|næhijish]] || [[word:næhiji|næhiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahuhujuth|nahuhujuth]] || [[word:nahuhujuj|nahuhujuj]] || [[word:nahuhujush|nahuhujush]] || [[word:nahuhuju|nahuhuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahujuth|nahujuth]] || [[word:nahujuj|nahujuj]] || [[word:nahujush|nahujush]] || [[word:nahuju|nahuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahufjuth|nahufjuth]] || [[word:nahufjuj|nahufjuj]] || [[word:nahufjush|nahufjush]] || [[word:nahufjuf|nahufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nahujuthu|nahujuthu]] || [[word:nahujuju|nahujuju]] || [[word:nahujushu|nahujushu]] || [[word:nahujuku|nahujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nahujuth|nahujuth]] || [[word:nahujuj|nahujuj]] || [[word:nahujush|nahujush]] || [[word:nahuju|nahuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nahujuthul|nahujuthul]] || [[word:nahujujul|nahujujul]] || [[word:nahujushul|nahujushul]] || [[word:nahujukul|nahujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nahujuthuthu|nahujuthuthu]] || [[word:nahujujuju|nahujujuju]] || [[word:nahujushushu|nahujushushu]] || [[word:nahujuku|nahujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nahujuthun|nahujuthun]] || [[word:nahujujun|nahujujun]] || [[word:nahujushun|nahujushun]] || [[word:nahujukun|nahujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nahujuthuoro|nahujuthuoro]] || [[word:nahujujuoro|nahujujuoro]] || [[word:nahujushuoro|nahujushuoro]] || [[word:nahujukuoro|nahujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
